function collides(l1: LayoutItem, l2: LayoutItem): boolean {
  // Same element - can't collide with itself
  if (l1.i === l2.i) return false;
  return collidesBounds(getCollisionBounds(l1), l2);
}

function getFirstCollision(layout: Layout, layoutItem: LayoutItem): LayoutItem | undefined {
  for (let i = 0; i < layout.length; i++) {
    const item = layout[i];
    if (item !== undefined && collides(item, layoutItem)) {
      return item;
    }
  }
  return undefined;
}

function getAllCollisions(layout: Layout, layoutItem: LayoutItem): LayoutItem[] {
  return layout.filter((l): l is LayoutItem => collides(l, layoutItem));
}
